mermaidSyntax:
flowchart TD A["Literature Mining
(PubMed, DrugBank)"] --> B["Target Identification"] B --> C["Network Pharmacology Analysis"] B --> D["Molecular Docking Screening"] C --> E["Hit Validation"] D --> E E --> F{"Decision Gate:
Proceed or Loop Back?"} F -->|"Hits confirmed"| G["Cell Viability Assays
(MTT, WST-1)"] F -->|"No viable hits"| A G --> H["Dose-Response Curves
(IC50 Determination)"] H --> I["Mechanism Studies
(Western Blot, qPCR)"] I -->|"Results don't match"| B I -->|"Hits confirmed"| J["Animal Studies"] J --> K["Pharmacokinetic Profiling"] K --> L["Efficacy Studies"] L --> M["Safety / Toxicology"] M --> N["IND Filing"]

failures.description: No section/subgraph grouping — diagram is flat
failures.suggestedFix: Use Mermaid subgraphs to group related nodes into phases
